section.heading: Foreign mail as United States mail

content.p: Every foreign mail, while being transported across the territory of the United States under authority of law, is mail of the United States, and any depredation thereon, or offense in respect thereto, shall be punishable as though it were United States mail.

note.heading: Historical and Revision Notes
note.p: Minor changes were made in phraseology and obvious surplusage omitted.
